notes: Added an On-the-go tab to the hosted release hub for capturing pending goal, routine, task prompt, and calendar block updates.
Added a local On-the-go Updates page for connecting to a user-owned Google Sheet and reviewing pending updates before importing them into the Workspace.
Added user-owned Google Sheet sync settings stored inside the Workspace system folder.
On-the-go imports can create captured goals, active routines, staged Google Tasks prompts, or staged calendar blocks after user review.
Added CSV fallback for on-the-go updates when direct hosted Google Sheet writing is not configured yet.
